backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining core data types (Story, UserProfile, Comment, Report, etc.) and business logic including story CRUD, likes/pins, comments, search/filter with geospatial distance calculations, and blob storage/authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three QissaMap features (search bar, fly-to pin marker, nearby popular stories display) to their implementing source files and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing the purpose and key behaviors of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart palette, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, setting viewport meta, geolocation Permissions-Policy for ICP domains, page title, and mounting the root div with the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing authentication state, view routing (home/profile/admin/localUpdates/qissamap), profile setup modal display, and a dev-mode interactivity guard that detects and removes stuck pointer-events/inert attributes.
frontend/src/components/CreateStoryDialo: Dialog component for creating and editing story drafts, handling title/content/category/location/image inputs, draft save/load/publish lifecycle, and submitting the final story to the backend.
frontend/src/components/CreateStoryFAB.t: Floating action button component that triggers story creation, styled as a gradient circular button with a plus icon and supporting async click handlers.
frontend/src/components/DistanceKmSlider: A range slider component for selecting a distance in kilometers, with configurable min/max/step values, an inactive/disabled visual state, and an optional helper text label.
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: A horizontal button bar that lets users filter stories by category, rendering an 'All' option plus one button per category with active/inactive styling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky app header with the StoryMap logo, navigation buttons (QissaMap, Local Updates), a theme toggle, and an authenticated user dropdown menu with admin-aware navigation options.
frontend/src/components/local-updates/Cr: A dialog form for creating a local update with content, category, radius slider, and optional image, requiring the user's geolocation to submit.
frontend/src/components/local-updates/Lo: A dialog component that displays full details of a local update, including image, content, category, location, relevance, view/thumbs-up counts, and allows authors or admins to delete the update.
A dialog component that lets users toggle mute/unmute notifications for each local update category using switches.
A floating action button (FAB) component fixed to the bottom-right corner that triggers creation of a new local update.
Renders a scrollable list of local update cards with category badges, relevance indicators, timestamps, view counts, and thumbs-up buttons; clicking a card opens its detail dialog.
A map view component using Leaflet that plots local updates as markers, shows the user's current location, and displays a selected update's details in a card overlay.
frontend/src/components/LocationPickerDi: A modal dialog that embeds a MapView to let users pick a geographic location, automatically requesting browser geolocation on open and confirming the selected coordinates via a callback.
frontend/src/components/MapView.tsx: A full-featured Leaflet map component that dynamically loads Leaflet and the marker-cluster plugin, renders story markers with clustering, supports location search via Nominatim, and handles user/selected/teleport location markers.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A non-dismissible dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to choose a username, then saves their profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/QissaMapSearchBa: A floating, pill-shaped search bar component positioned over a map that handles location query input, submission, loading state, error display, and clear functionality.
frontend/src/components/QissaMapView.tsx: A Leaflet-based interactive map component that displays story markers with optional clustering, a user location marker, a searched-location marker, and popular story markers, emitting center-change events on map movement.
frontend/src/components/SortControl.tsx: A dropdown UI control for selecting story sort order (newest, nearest, most viewed, most liked, most pinned), with the 'nearest' option optionally disabled when location is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/StoryCard.tsx: A card component that displays a story preview with image, category badge, distance, like/pin/share actions, and delegates click to a parent handler.
frontend/src/components/StoryDetailDialo: A full-detail dialog for a story supporting viewing, liking, pinning, commenting, reporting, deleting, and inline editing of story fields including image replacement.
frontend/src/components/StoryFeed.tsx: A responsive grid that renders a list of StoryCard components with loading skeletons and an empty-state message when no stories are available.
frontend/src/components/WallpaperSetting: A dialog for selecting, previewing, applying, or removing a custom background wallpaper image, with file validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/env.d.ts: TypeScript declaration file that extends Vite's ImportMetaEnv interface to include the optional VITE_II_URL environment variable.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDrafts.ts: A collection of React Query hooks for listing, fetching, creating, and updating story drafts via the backend actor, with toast notifications for success and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useForegroundLocation: React hook that tracks the user's geolocation using the browser's watchPosition API with a polling fallback, exposing location state, error, tracking status, and a manual refresh function.
frontend/src/hooks/useGeolocationPermiss: React hook that checks and manages browser geolocation permission state (including secure context and Permissions Policy checks), requests location, and exposes diagnostics and error details.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and exposing identity and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeafletMapResize.t: React hook that invalidates a Leaflet map's size when its container becomes visible or resizes, using ResizeObserver and multiple timed callbacks to prevent blank map rendering in hidden containers.
React hook that manages per-category mute preferences for local updates, persisting the muted state to localStorage and exposing toggle and query functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalUpdateNotific: React hook that monitors local updates for proximity relevance and triggers system notifications or in-app toasts when a nearby, unmuted update is first detected.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalUpdates.ts: React Query-based hooks for CRUD operations on local updates, including adding an update, fetching all active updates, and fetching updates by proximity or category via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, stories, comments, admin checks, and mutations, with a helper to wait for the actor to become available.
frontend/src/hooks/useReverseGeocodedPla: Custom hook that reverse-geocodes a lat/lon coordinate pair into a human-readable place name, managing loading and error state with abort-on-unmount support.
frontend/src/hooks/useWallpaper.ts: Custom hook that manages a user-selected wallpaper image, persisting it as a data URL in localStorage and exposing apply/remove callbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind directives, OKLCH-based CSS design tokens for light and dark themes, and custom styles for app layout and Leaflet map markers.
frontend/src/lib/categories.ts: Utility functions that map story Category enum values to display labels with emoji and Tailwind color class strings.
frontend/src/lib/currentLocationMarker.t: Exports a factory function that creates a Leaflet divIcon for the current-location marker using a dot-and-ring CSS design.
frontend/src/lib/distanceFilterDebug.ts: Opt-in debug utility for distance filtering that logs filter center and per-story inclusion decisions to the console, toggled via localStorage and exposed on the window object.
frontend/src/lib/env.ts: Typed helper functions for reading Vite VITE_-prefixed environment variables with optional fallback values.
frontend/src/lib/leafletLoader.ts: Singleton loader for Leaflet and MarkerCluster scripts/stylesheets with reference counting, deduplication of DOM elements, and retry-on-error support.
frontend/src/lib/localUpdates.ts: Utility functions for local updates feature: maps LocalCategory enum values to labels, Tailwind colors, and hex icon colors, and computes whether a user is within an update's radius.
frontend/src/lib/locationFilter.ts: Provides proximity-based story filtering utilities using the Haversine formula, including functions to check if a story's coordinates fall within a given radius of a base location.
Defines UI copy (titles, descriptions, action labels) for each geolocation permission state (idle, granted, denied, etc.) and exports a helper to retrieve copy by state.
frontend/src/lib/popularStoryMarker.ts: Factory function that creates a styled Leaflet divIcon for popular story markers, using category emojis and rank-based gold/silver/bronze border colors.
frontend/src/lib/reverseGeocode.ts: Reverse geocodes lat/lon coordinates via the OpenStreetMap Nominatim API, with in-memory and localStorage caching to avoid redundant requests.
frontend/src/lib/searchLocationMarker.ts: Factory function that creates a styled Leaflet divIcon for a searched location marker, rendered as a red teardrop pin with an optional location name label.
frontend/src/lib/startupValidation.ts: Validates critical runtime configuration (e.g., VITE_II_URL) at app startup and logs warnings to the console without blocking execution.
frontend/src/lib/storySorting.ts: Provides functions to sort stories by newest, nearest, most viewed, most liked, or most pinned, and to convert frontend sort options to backend SortOption types.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: General utility functions including Tailwind class merging, Haversine distance calculation, and distance/location formatting helpers.
frontend/src/lib/wallpaperValidation.ts: Validates wallpaper file uploads for size (max 10MB) and MIME type (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF), returning typed validation results.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminModerationPage.t: Admin-only page that displays reported stories, allowing admins to dismiss reports or delete stories, with access control based on caller admin status.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main home page that displays a filterable, sortable story feed or map view, supporting category filters, distance radius, teleport location override, and story creation/detail dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/LocalUpdatesPage.tsx: Page for browsing and creating proximity-based local updates, with list/map view toggle, geolocation permission handling, muting preferences, and in-app notifications.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page showing tabbed grids of the authenticated user's posted, liked, and pinned stories with loading skeletons and error states.
frontend/src/pages/QissaMapPage.tsx: Full-screen map page that displays nearby stories around the user's or a searched location, with Nominatim geocoding search and a popular-stories sidebar derived from engagement scores.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the QissaMap project state including existing features (location search, map pinning, floating story cards) and a pending feature request to add a working map search with popular stories display. Records architectural notes and known issues like the missing search functionality.
